title: Altinkoy pack
description: This modpack exists to get new sensations from minecraft. The modpack tries to improve the visual part of the game, without changing its mechanics.
body:
**This modpack exists to get new sensations from minecraft.** The modpack tries to improve the visual part of the game, without changing its mechanics. Thanks to this modpack, you will be able to take a different look at minecraft and get a new experience from.

![Thanks to the leaves falling from the trees and the starry sky, the player can look at the world of minecraft in a different way.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0e2bcc6bc643024907dea8fc3be9b9dbcf4bd256.jpeg)
Thanks to the leaves falling from the trees and the starry sky, the player can look at the world of minecraft in a different way.



![Surround sounds and a modified first-person view will give you a new experience in the game. And a lot of small modifications will help the player to improve the experience of the game.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9285a3eec8a83dc6d9d88422c58be2014c8f221e.jpeg)
Surround sounds and a modified first-person view will give you a new experience in the game. And a lot of small modifications will help the player to improve the experience of the game.



This modpack will be updated, trying to give players the opportunity to discover minecraft in a new way.
